subject: fix(print): overhaul print CSS for dark theme — fix invisible text, align with glow-props pattern
body:
The existing print CSS only set `body { background: white; color: black }`
but Tailwind utility classes (text-foreground, bg-card, bg-secondary-light)
still resolved to dark theme values — producing white text on white paper
and dark gray card backgrounds. This was a critical readability bug for
anyone using the "Save as PDF" or "Print / PDF" features.

Fix: Override :root CSS variables with light-theme values in @media print
so all Tailwind classes automatically resolve to print-friendly colors.
Also override hardcoded dark hex colors (secondary-light, secondary-dark),
add link styling, .print-avoid-break utility class, sticky→static override,
section/card/result-panel break-inside rules, and !important on
print-color-adjust. Full alignment with glow-props DOWNLOAD_PDF pattern.

Tags: print, css, bugfix, pdf, dark-theme
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
